CondorCollector.name: collector
CondorCollector.description: Deprecated. Name of the HTCondor collector; no longer used.

workflow_id.description: A unique identifier automatically generated for this workflow.

timestamp.description: The epoch time when this workflow was created.

priority.description: The workflow's priority level relative to other workflows.

anyOf.description: Indicates why the workflow was deactivated.
The epoch time when this workflow was deactivated.

task_id.description: A unique identifier automatically generated for this task.

workflow_id.description: The identifier of the overarching workflow object (M task directives : 1 workflow).

cluster_locations.description: The HTCondor pool(s) where the taskforce(s) will run.

task_image.description: The Docker/Singularity/Apptainer image to run for each event. Apptainer images in directory (sandbox) format will start fastest; other formats will first be converted to this format on each worker CPU.

task_args.description: The argument string to pass to the task image.

task_env.description: Environment variables (and values) to set in the task instance.

init_image.description: The Docker/Singularity/Apptainer image for the init container. See 'task_image' for caveats/optimizations regarding the image format.

init_args.description: The argument string to pass to the init container.

init_env.description: Environment variables (and values) to set in the init container.

timestamp.description: The epoch time when this task was created.

input_queues.description: The message queue(s) that this task will use for event input.

output_queues.description: The message queue(s) that this task will use for event output.

taskforce_uuid.description: A unique identifier automatically generated for this taskforce.

task_id.description: The identifier of the associated task directive object (N taskforces : 1 task directive).

workflow_id.description: The identifier of the overarching workflow object (N*M taskforces : M task directives : 1 workflow).

timestamp.description: The epoch time when this taskforce was created.

priority.description: The priority level relative to other taskforces (usually, this value is inherited from the parent workflow object).

anyOf.description: Deprecated. Address of the HTCondor collector; no longer used.

schedd.description: The address of the HTCondor schedd.

anyOf.description: The number of workers in this taskforce's HTCondor cluster (immutable).

pilot_config.description: Configuration settings for the EWMS pilot.

tag.description: The image tag to use (e.g., '#.#.#', 'latest', or a feature branch tag). Note: tags like # or #.# are disallowed since these are mutable. This field is useful for repeatability.

image_source.description: The canonical source name for the image.

environment.description: Environment variables and their corresponding values.

input_files.description: Paths to files to make available to the task container. These files must already be accessible on the AP.

worker_config.description: Configuration settings for the HTCondor cluster submission.

do_transfer_worker_stdouterr.description: Indicates whether to transfer back the workers' stdout and stderr (accessible on the AP).

max_worker_runtime.description: The maximum runtime for a worker. Adjust this to optimize performance (e.g., to terminate slow CPUs).

n_cores.description: The number of cores to request per HTCondor worker.

priority.description: The priority level for the HTCondor submission.

anyOf.description: The amount of disk space to request per HTCondor worker.
The amount of memory to request per HTCondor worker.

condor_requirements.description: The 'requirements' string given to the HTCondor submission.

anyOf.description: The identifier for the associated HTCondor cluster.

submit_dict.description: The actual HTCondor submit class ad.

job_event_log_fpath.description: The file path on the HTCondor AP containing job event logs.

phase.description: The current phase of the taskforce within the workflow's lifetime. Not all taskforces will enter every phase.

phase_change_log.description: A record of all attempted phase changes, including both successful and unsuccessful ones.

target_phase.description: The phase that the system was attempting to transition to.

timestamp.description: The epoch timestamp when this phase change attempt was recorded in the system.

was_successful.description: Indicates whether the phase change was completed successfully, i.e. did it actually change?

anyOf.description: The epoch timestamp of the external event that led to this phase change attempt.
Indicates no specific external event was tied to this phase change.

source_entity.description: The entity (person, system, or process) responsible for the external event that triggered this phase change attempt.

context.description: The circumstances or background information about the phase change attempt.

compound_statuses.description: Aggregated status of the workers, represented as a nested dictionary mapping HTCondor states to EWMS pilot states and their counts.

top_task_errors.description: The most common errors encountered by workers, paired with their occurrence counts.

FindObject.description: The fields and values used to search.

projection.description: The fields to include in the response

after.description: The database '_id' to resume pagination from, taken from a previous response's 'next_after' field.

anyOf.description: The value to supply as 'after' in the next request for pagination. If null, there are no more results.

n_taskforces.description: Number of taskforces to be stopped.

200.description: Empty response object.

post.description: Queries and returns a list of task directive objects based on the provided criteria. See `FindObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#findobject>`_, `TaskDirectiveObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskdirectiveobject>`_.

200.description: Matching task directives and pagination metadata.

task_directives.description: A list of task directive objects. Entries may not be unique if query included a 'projection'.

post.description: Queries and returns a list of taskforce objects based on the provided criteria. See `FindObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#findobject>`_, `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

200.description: Matching taskforces and pagination metadata.

taskforces.description: A list of taskforce objects. Entries may not be unique if query included a 'projection'.

post.description: Queries and returns a list of workflow objects based on the provided criteria. See `FindObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#findobject>`_, `WorkflowObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#workflowobject>`_.

200.description: Matching workflows and pagination metadata.

workflows.description: A list of workflow objects. Entries may not be unique if query included a 'projection'.

200.description: The OpenAPI schema.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: The ID of the task directive

get.description: Retrieves the task directive that matches the specified task ID. See `TaskDirectiveObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskdirectiveobject>`_.

200.description: The matching task directive

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: The ID of the task directive to which the taskforce (and workers) will be added.

post.description: Creates a new taskforce (and associated workers) for an existing task directive. See `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

200.description: The created taskforce object with its details.

get.description: Retrieves the taskforce object that matches the specified taskforce UUID. See `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

200.description: The matching taskforce object

post.description: For internal use only (TMS): Updates the specified taskforce with the completion timestamp of the HTCondor cluster. See `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

condor_complete_ts.description: The time when the taskforce's HTCondor cluster ended.

200.description: The UUID of the updated taskforce object

post.description: For internal use only (TMS): Confirms that a taskforce has been removed on HTCondor. See `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

200.description: The UUID of the updated taskforce object

post.description: For internal use only (TMS): Communicates that a taskforce failed to be removed on HTCondor. See `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

error.description: A description of why the taskforce could not be removed from HTCondor.

200.description: The UUID of the updated taskforce object

post.description: For internal use only (TMS): Confirms that a taskforce has been submitted to HTCondor for execution. See `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

200.description: The UUID of the updated taskforce object

post.description: For internal use only (TMS): Communicates that a taskforce failed to be submitted to HTCondor for execution. See `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

error.description: A description of why the taskforce could not be submitted to HTCondor.

200.description: The UUID of the updated taskforce object

get.description: For internal use only (TMS): Retrieves the next taskforce ready to start at the specified HTCondor location. See `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_, `TaskDirectiveObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskdirectiveobject>`_.

200.description: The next taskforce to start at the HTCondor location.

mqprofiles.description: MQ profiles relevant to this taskforce. See https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/mqs-objects.html#mqprofileobject.

get.description: For internal use only (TMS): Retrieves the next taskforce ready to stop at the specified HTCondor location. See `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

200.description: The next taskforce to stop at the HTCondor location.

post.description: For internal use only (TMS): Updates and returns the statuses and errors for the specified taskforces. See `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

top_task_errors_by_taskforce.description: The top errors (paired with a count) for each indicated taskforce

compound_statuses_by_taskforce.description: The compound statuses (status -> state -> count) for the indicated taskforces

200.description: Individual update results for each UUID.

207.description: Individual update results for each UUID, including errors.

post.description: Creates a new workflow along with its associated task directives and taskforces. See `WorkflowObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#workflowobject>`_, `TaskDirectiveObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskdirectiveobject>`_, `TaskforceObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#taskforceobject>`_.

input_queue_aliases.description: User-defined aliases for input event queues. Globally-unique IDs for the queues will be generated after submission.

output_queue_aliases.description: User-defined aliases for output event queues. Globally-unique IDs for the queues will be generated after submission.

public_queue_aliases.description: User-defined aliases for queues listed in 'input_queue_aliases' and 'output_queue_aliases' that will be used externally. The actual IDs will be generated after submission.

priority.description: The workflow's priority level relative to other workflows.

200.description: The created workflow, task directives, and taskforces.

parameters.name: workflow_id
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow object

get.description: Retrieves the workflow object that matches the specified workflow ID. See `WorkflowObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#workflowobject>`_.

200.description: The matching workflow object

parameters.name: workflow_id
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow object

post.description: Aborts the specified workflow, marks it as deactivated, and sends stop commands to the associated taskforces. See `DeactivatedWorkflowResponseObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#deactivatedworkflowresponseobject>`_.

200.description: Summary of the deactivated workflow.

parameters.name: workflow_id
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow object

post.description: Marks the specified workflow as finished, marks it as deactivated, and sends stop commands to the associated taskforces. See `DeactivatedWorkflowResponseObject <https://observation-management-service.github.io/ewms-docs/apis/_generated/wms-objects.html#deactivatedworkflowresponseobject>`_.

200.description: Summary of the deactivated workflow.
